message:
feat(robot): add --bead and --prompt flags to restart-pane command

Extend restart-pane to optionally assign work and send a prompt to
restarted agent panes, enabling one-command "restart + assign" flows:

New options:
- --bead <ID>: fetches bead info via "br show <ID> --json", builds
  an assignment prompt from restartPaneBeadPromptTemplate containing
  the bead ID and title, and validates the bead exists before
  restarting any panes (fail-fast on invalid bead)
- --prompt <text>: sends a custom prompt to all successfully restarted
  panes; overrides the --bead template when both are specified

Prompt delivery:
- After successful pane restarts, waits 500ms for shell initialization
- Sends prompt + newline via tmux.SendKeys to each restarted pane
- Reports success/failure in RestartPaneOutput.PromptSent and
  PromptError fields (non-fatal — restart still succeeds if prompt
  delivery fails)

New helper — buildBeadPrompt():
- Runs "br show <beadID> --json" and parses the title from output
- Returns formatted prompt from restartPaneBeadPromptTemplate with
  {bead_id} and {bead_title} placeholders replaced

Output additions:
- BeadAssigned: echoes the bead ID when --bead was used
- PromptSent: true when prompt was delivered to all panes
- PromptError: concatenated per-pane errors if delivery failed

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
